data.title: Dr. Steven J. Corwin resigning as President/CEO of NewYork-Presbyterian after 14 years; Dr. Brian G. Donley to succeed him.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, NewYork-Presbyterian revealed that Dr. Steven J. Corwin will be resigning from his position as President and CEO on January 22, 2026. Dr. Corwin's departure comes after leading the organization for 14 years, overseeing remarkable growth during his tenure.

data.title: OpenAI's ChatGPT Atlas browser vulnerable to prompt injection attacks, posing threat to crypto users - stay safe!
data.description: The AI web browser developed by OpenAI is currently at risk of quick prompt injection attacks, a security issue described by experts as unresolved. Despite this vulnerability, there are precautionary measures that users can take to protect themselves.

data.title: California's EDD aims to improve unemployment benefits processing for faster and accurate payments to customers.
data.description: Important update on California's Employment Development Department - they are simplifying the process for recipients of unemployment benefits to report necessary wage and income details while receiving their payments. This initiative is aimed at facilitating faster benefit payments.

data.title: Heritage Commerce Corp reports double-digit EPS growth in Q3, driven by core business momentum and operating leverage.
data.description: Double-digit growth in earnings per share (EPS) was achieved in the third quarter due to strong momentum in core business operations and operating leverage. The company experienced significant growth in key financial metrics, with a notable increase in revenue and profit margins. EPS saw a substantial increase of [XX]% compared to the previous quarter, highlighting the success of strategic business decisions and operational efficiencies. The positive trend in core business performance and operating leverage is expected to continue driving growth and profitability in the upcoming quarters.

data.title: EquipmentShare opens new branch in Redmond, Oregon as part of $185M statewide expansion, creating up to 120 jobs.
data.description: In Redmond, Oregon, EquipmentShare, a prominent technology-focused equipment rental and solutions company in the US, has unveiled its latest branch, marking a significant step in its state-wide growth strategy. This move represents a substantial $185 million investment in Oregon, with projections indicating the potential creation of around 120 job opportunities. With this development, EquipmentShare's presence in Oregon will expand to encompass 10 locations in total. The inauguration of the new facility was commemorated with a ribbon-cutting ceremony attended by company executives and esteemed state and local dignitaries.

data.title: Corporación Inmobiliaria Vesta reports Q3 2025 earnings results. BMV: VESTA; NYSE: VTMX. Financials prepared under IFRS.
data.description: In Mexico City, Corporación Inmobiliaria Vesta S.A.B. de C.V. unveiled its third quarter results for the period ending on September 30, 2025. Vesta, a top industrial real estate firm in Mexico trading as BMV: VESTA and NYSE: VTMX, reported its financial data according to International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS), deviating in some aspects from U.S. GAAP. It is advised that the disclosed figures are reviewed alongside the full report for a comprehensive understanding.

data.title: Hammond Power Solutions Inc. reports third quarter 2025 financial results as a leading manufacturer of transformers.
data.description: In Guelph, Ontario on October 23, 2025, Hammond Power Solutions Inc. (HPS), a prominent manufacturer of dry-type transformers and power quality products, shared its financial performance for the third quarter of 2025. Traded under the symbol TSX: HPS.A, the company reported its earnings and outcomes during this period.

data.title: AFA-CWA President Sara Nelson to support  strike at Horseshoe Indianapolis with Teamsters on Oct. 25 at 9 a.m.
data.description: In Shelbyville, Indiana on October 23, 2025, Sara Nelson, the International President of the Association of Flight Attendants-CWA, will stand in support of striking dealers and dual rates at Horseshoe Indianapolis on October 25, 2025, at 9 a.m. The move is to demonstrate unity with the striking Teamsters in their protest.

data.title: MDNA Therapeutics Corp. to present updated MDNA11 clinical data at ESMO Immuno-Oncology Congress 2025 in London on Dec 10-12.
data.description: Medicenna Therapeutics Corp., a clinical-stage immunotherapy company, will be presenting updated clinical data for MDNA11 at the European Society for Medical Oncology Immuno-Oncology Congress 2025 in London from December 10-12, 2025. The company's stock is listed as TSX: MDNA and OTCQX: MDNAF.

data.title: Universal Logistics Holdings, Inc. Postpones Third Quarter 2025 Earnings Release
data.description: Today, Universal Logistics Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: ULH) from Warren, Michigan, made an announcement that they are delaying the release of their financial results for the third quarter ending on September 27, 2025. The results were initially set to be disclosed on October 23, 2025. This decision was made to provide more time for additional review and evaluations.

data.title: 90% of crypto market structure bill is complete despite gov’t shutdown, with remaining 10% focused on DeFi. Lawmakers are handling DeFi issues cautiously to protect innovation - Coinbase CEO
data.description: Brian Armstrong stated that the remaining 10% of problems primarily revolve around decentralized finance (DeFi), which lawmakers are handling cautiously to maintain innovation.

data.title: Buenaventura (NYSE: BVN; BUE.LM) to hold Q3 2025 earnings call on October 31, 2025 at 12:00 PM ET (11:00 AM LT). CEO and management team to review financial and operating results.
data.description: In Lima, Peru, Compañía de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. (NYSE: BVN; Lima Stock Exchange: BUE.LM) has announced the scheduling of its Third Quarter 2025 earnings conference call. The call is set to take place on Friday, October 31, 2025, at 12:00 PM Eastern Time and 11:00 AM Lima Time. During the call, Leandro García Raggio, the Chief Executive Officer, along with other senior management team members, will review Buenaventura’s Third Quarter 2025 financial and operating results.

data.title: Farmland Partners Inc. will release Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 29 after 5pm ET and host conference call on Oct 30 at 11am ET.
data.description: Farmland Partners Inc. (NYSE: FPI) is set to unveil its financial report for the quarter concluded on September 30, 2025, post 5 p.m. (ET) on October 29, 2025. The Company will conduct a conference call on October 30, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. (ET) to review the financial outcomes and present a business update. To join the call, dial 1-800-715-9871.

data.title: Nextracker stock rises after strong Q2 results. Q2 Revenue: $905.27M, Adjusted EPS: $1.19. Total revenue up 42% YoY. Backlog over $5B.
data.description: Nextracker Inc's (NASDAQ: NXT) stock is surging in after-hours trading following the release of their impressive second quarter fiscal 2026 results. The company exceeded expectations with Q2 revenue reaching $905.27 million, surpassing estimated $838.62 million, and Q2 Adjusted EPS at $1.19, higher than estimated $1.01. Total revenue for the quarter saw a 42% year-over-year increase. Nextracker also revealed that their backlog now exceeds $5 billion. At the close of the quarter, the company held $845 million in cash and cash equivalents. This report signals a potential breakout for NXT. Check out the full breakdown for more details.

data.title: Imperial Metals reports Q3 2025 at Red Chris Mine with 20.9M lbs copper, 21,660 oz gold. Company's share: 6.27M lbs copper, 6,498 oz gold. Ticker: TSX:III.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 23, 2025, Imperial Metals Corporation announced its quarterly production results from the Red Chris mine in northwest British Columbia. In the third quarter of 2025, the Red Chris mine produced 20.9 million pounds of copper and 21,660 ounces of gold, representing a significant increase from the same period in 2024 when production stood at 18.977 million pounds of copper and 13,414 ounces of gold. Imperial Metals Corporation, owning a 30% stake in the Red Chris mine, reported its share of the Q3 production as 6.27 million pounds of copper and 6,498 ounces of gold.

data.title: Primis Financial Corp. reports Q3 earnings per share of $7 and declares quarterly dividend of $0.10 per share.
data.description: Primis Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: FRST) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share on October 23, 2025. The company, along with its subsidiary Primis Bank, disclosed a net income available to common shareholders of $7 million.

data.title: Post Holdings (NYSE: POST) to hold Q4 fiscal year 2025 conference call on Nov 21 at 9:00 a.m. ET. #earnings #stocks
data.description: On October 23, 2025, a global consumer packaged goods holding company, Post Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: POST), disclosed plans to convene a conference call on November 21, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The purpose of the call is to delve into the financial outcomes of the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025.

data.title: DAVIDsTEA presents at Toronto's Planet MicroCap Showcase, an event in partnership with MicroCapClub. TSX-Venture: DTEA.
data.description: In Montreal on October 23, 2025, DAVIDsTEA Inc. (TSX-Venture: DTEA), a prominent tea retailer in North America, revealed their participation in the Planet MicroCap Showcase: TORONTO 2025 alongside MicroCapClub.

data.title: AlphaGen plans to raise $2.5 million through private placement.
data.description: A recent report has revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States fell to 4.2% in the month of August, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.4%. The economy added 235,000 jobs in August, surpassing economists' expectations. The job gains were seen across various sectors, including hospitality, professional services, and healthcare. The report also highlighted a rise in average hourly earnings by 0.6% in August, bringing the total increase over the past year to 4.3%. These positive indicators suggest a strengthening labor market and an improving economic outlook for the country.
